records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard you're being discharged today. How are you feeling?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard you're being discharged today. How are you feeling?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard you're being discharged today. How are you feeling?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure. I got to rest comfortably because others were busy instead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure. I got to rest comfortably because others were busy instead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure. I got to rest comfortably because others were busy instead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since other squad members needed more time to recover, I decided to return to work first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since other squad members needed more time to recover, I decided to return to work first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since other squad members needed more time to recover, I decided to return to work first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If necessary, feel free to use your year-end vacation. Even the Vice President won't object to that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If necessary, feel free to use your year-end vacation. Even the Vice President won't object to that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If necessary, feel free to use your year-end vacation. Even the Vice President won't object to that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, thank you for caring.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, thank you for caring.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, thank you for caring.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But isn't it a bit of a waste to spend my precious <color=#ffd34c>youth</color> in a hospital? I want to build my career, even just a little more.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But isn't it a bit of a waste to spend my precious <color=#ffd34c>youth</color> in a hospital? I want to build my career, even just a little more.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But isn't it a bit of a waste to spend my precious <color=#ffd34c>youth</color> in a hospital? I want to build my career, even just a little more.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
You say career
8v
records.m_Talk_DEU:
You say career
8v
records.m_Talk_FRA:
You say career
8v

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't think there will be any tasks that could boost your career for now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't think there will be any tasks that could boost your career for now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't think there will be any tasks that could boost your career for now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Instead, I'd like to assign you the task of training a rookie Counter if you're okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Instead, I'd like to assign you the task of training a rookie Counter if you're okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Instead, I'd like to assign you the task of training a rookie Counter if you're okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Training a rookie? Me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Training a rookie? Me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Training a rookie? Me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's not officially an employee yet, but I'm counting on you to help her become competent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's not officially an employee yet, but I'm counting on you to help her become competent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's not officially an employee yet, but I'm counting on you to help her become competent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Especially in terms of social skills.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Especially in terms of social skills.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Especially in terms of social skills.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a personal favor of mine. If teaching feels too burdensome, let me know in advance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a personal favor of mine. If teaching feels too burdensome, let me know in advance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a personal favor of mine. If teaching feels too burdensome, let me know in advance.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Haha, so it is a personal favor from Boss
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Haha, so it is a personal favor from Boss
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Haha, so it is a personal favor from Boss
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This works out well. As I'm reporting back after a long time, it's good not to be awkward alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This works out well. As I'm reporting back after a long time, it's good not to be awkward alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This works out well. As I'm reporting back after a long time, it's good not to be awkward alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. I'll leave it all in your hands, Seo Yoon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. I'll leave it all in your hands, Seo Yoon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. I'll leave it all in your hands, Seo Yoon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave it to me. Just like always.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave it to me. Just like always.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave it to me. Just like always.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was a pointless thing to say. <color=#ffd34c>Youth</color>, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was a pointless thing to say. <color=#ffd34c>Youth</color>, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was a pointless thing to say. <color=#ffd34c>Youth</color>, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never even experienced a time like that, so why did I say something like that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never even experienced a time like that, so why did I say something like that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never even experienced a time like that, so why did I say something like that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Instructor for a rookie...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Instructor for a rookie...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Instructor for a rookie...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I won't be bored, at least.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I won't be bored, at least.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I won't be bored, at least.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She still hasn't arrived yet?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She still hasn't arrived yet?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She still hasn't arrived yet?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No... She said she'd come by city bus, but I've been waiting at the stop for an hour and haven't seen her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No... She said she'd come by city bus, but I've been waiting at the stop for an hour and haven't seen her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No... She said she'd come by city bus, but I've been waiting at the stop for an hour and haven't seen her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She doesn't have a contact number. Should we consider filing a missing person report?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She doesn't have a contact number. Should we consider filing a missing person report?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She doesn't have a contact number. Should we consider filing a missing person report?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You mentioned there's just one bus route from the airport to the company, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You mentioned there's just one bus route from the airport to the company, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You mentioned there's just one bus route from the airport to the company, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? But I want to keep watching the view from the window here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? But I want to keep watching the view from the window here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? But I want to keep watching the view from the window here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, kid. Like I said earlier, all passengers have to get off at the turnaround point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, kid. Like I said earlier, all passengers have to get off at the turnaround point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, kid. Like I said earlier, all passengers have to get off at the turnaround point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, but buses don't run for free. Or you can pay more money.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, but buses don't run for free. Or you can pay more money.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, but buses don't run for free. Or you can pay more money.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't have any money left...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't have any money left...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't have any money left...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How about this? It smells really good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How about this? It smells really good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How about this? It smells really good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A bouquet...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A bouquet...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A bouquet...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you trying to sell me flowers?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you trying to sell me flowers?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you trying to sell me flowers?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't need change!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't need change!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't need change!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Change, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Change, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Change, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
We're about to leave, so if you're just messing around, step off
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
We're about to leave, so if you're just messing around, step off
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
We're about to leave, so if you're just messing around, step off
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew, good thing it hasn't left yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew, good thing it hasn't left yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew, good thing it hasn't left yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Two tickets, please.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Two tickets, please.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Two tickets, please.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Two? But it looks like you're alone, miss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Two? But it looks like you're alone, miss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Two? But it looks like you're alone, miss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's for my little sister here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's for my little sister here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's for my little sister here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's your sibling?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's your sibling?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's your sibling?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um... Thank you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um... Thank you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um... Thank you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No need to thank me. You'll pay it back eventually.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No need to thank me. You'll pay it back eventually.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No need to thank me. You'll pay it back eventually.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the rookie coming to train at Coffin Company, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the rookie coming to train at Coffin Company, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the rookie coming to train at Coffin Company, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, no.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, no.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, no.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My name isn't rookie, it's Solovey.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My name isn't rookie, it's Solovey.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My name isn't rookie, it's Solovey.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, you've got a strong sense of self, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, you've got a strong sense of self, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, you've got a strong sense of self, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But no fare money? Did Boss not give you enough?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But no fare money? Did Boss not give you enough?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But no fare money? Did Boss not give you enough?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I gave the money to someone else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I gave the money to someone else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I gave the money to someone else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone else? Who?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone else? Who?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone else? Who?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I ran into a child before getting on the bus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I ran into a child before getting on the bus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I ran into a child before getting on the bus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. So you gave away all the money you had?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. So you gave away all the money you had?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. So you gave away all the money you had?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She said she needed to buy so expensive medicine to cure her mother's sickness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She said she needed to buy so expensive medicine to cure her mother's sickness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She said she needed to buy so expensive medicine to cure her mother's sickness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When someone precious to you is sick, it's sad. That's why I gave it to her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When someone precious to you is sick, it's sad. That's why I gave it to her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When someone precious to you is sick, it's sad. That's why I gave it to her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Expensive medicine...? That's such an obvious lie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Expensive medicine...? That's such an obvious lie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Expensive medicine...? That's such an obvious lie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you really that gullible?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you really that gullible?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you really that gullible?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a lie? But she really seemed to need it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a lie? But she really seemed to need it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a lie? But she really seemed to need it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh*

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was told to teach you social skills, but I wasn't sure where to start. But never expected you would fall for such a simple trick.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was told to teach you social skills, but I wasn't sure where to start. But never expected you would fall for such a simple trick.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was told to teach you social skills, but I wasn't sure where to start. But never expected you would fall for such a simple trick.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Listen carefully. You shouldn't easily trust people just based on their appearance or words.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Listen carefully. You shouldn't easily trust people just based on their appearance or words.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Listen carefully. You shouldn't easily trust people just based on their appearance or words.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Especially in the city, trusting anyone too easily will only lead to losses.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Especially in the city, trusting anyone too easily will only lead to losses.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Especially in the city, trusting anyone too easily will only lead to losses.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Got it! I won't give money away so easily anymore!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Got it! I won't give money away so easily anymore!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Got it! I won't give money away so easily anymore!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even though I don't have any right now...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even though I don't have any right now...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even though I don't have any right now...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine. You came here to earn money, so work hard to save money from now on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine. You came here to earn money, so work hard to save money from now on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine. You came here to earn money, so work hard to save money from now on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I was planning to start by assessing your Counter ability, but it looks like there's a long way to go in other aspects too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I was planning to start by assessing your Counter ability, but it looks like there's a long way to go in other aspects too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I was planning to start by assessing your Counter ability, but it looks like there's a long way to go in other aspects too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, how did you end up staying on the bus until the last stop? Did you doze off?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, how did you end up staying on the bus until the last stop? Did you doze off?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, how did you end up staying on the bus until the last stop? Did you doze off?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No? It's my first time riding something this fun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No? It's my first time riding something this fun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No? It's my first time riding something this fun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The view outside the window was moving so captivatingly that I lost track of time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The view outside the window was moving so captivatingly that I lost track of time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The view outside the window was moving so captivatingly that I lost track of time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know I'd have to pay more to keep riding, though.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know I'd have to pay more to keep riding, though.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know I'd have to pay more to keep riding, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's always good to have money on you. In the city, you can enjoy all sorts of benefits, but most of them require money.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's always good to have money on you. In the city, you can enjoy all sorts of benefits, but most of them require money.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's always good to have money on you. In the city, you can enjoy all sorts of benefits, but most of them require money.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where have you been living until now that you don't even know how to ride a bus?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where have you been living until now that you don't even know how to ride a bus?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where have you been living until now that you don't even know how to ride a bus?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I lived in a garden. With Mother when it was the two of us, and even when I was alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I lived in a garden. With Mother when it was the two of us, and even when I was alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I lived in a garden. With Mother when it was the two of us, and even when I was alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There aren't many flowers or trees here, but I like it because there are so many big houses.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There aren't many flowers or trees here, but I like it because there are so many big houses.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There aren't many flowers or trees here, but I like it because there are so many big houses.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A garden...? So apparently she's a countryside kid who has just moved to the city?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A garden...? So apparently she's a countryside kid who has just moved to the city?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A garden...? So apparently she's a countryside kid who has just moved to the city?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's going to take a lot of work, but I don't have a choice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's going to take a lot of work, but I don't have a choice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's going to take a lot of work, but I don't have a choice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Seo Yoon. I'll be looking after you starting today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Seo Yoon. I'll be looking after you starting today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Seo Yoon. I'll be looking after you starting today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a veteran of Coffin Company, where you'll be training, and one of the Boss's closest associates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a veteran of Coffin Company, where you'll be training, and one of the Boss's closest associates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a veteran of Coffin Company, where you'll be training, and one of the Boss's closest associates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: For now, stick with me and don't wander off on your own. If I leave you alone, no matter how much money you're given, you'll end up broke in no time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For now, stick with me and don't wander off on your own. If I leave you alone, no matter how much money you're given, you'll end up broke in no time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For now, stick with me and don't wander off on your own. If I leave you alone, no matter how much money you're given, you'll end up broke in no time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! I'll make sure to stay right by you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! I'll make sure to stay right by you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! I'll make sure to stay right by you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By the way, how did you end up joining this company? Boss doesn't bring in just anyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: By the way, how did you end up joining this company? Boss doesn't bring in just anyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: By the way, how did you end up joining this company? Boss doesn't bring in just anyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't have a home. I heard the company provides training and a place to stay, so I came here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't have a home. I heard the company provides training and a place to stay, so I came here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't have a home. I heard the company provides training and a place to stay, so I came here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before I got here, I ate pork cutlets with Mr. Administrator at somewhere called a restaurant. They were so tasty!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before I got here, I ate pork cutlets with Mr. Administrator at somewhere called a restaurant. They were so tasty!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before I got here, I ate pork cutlets with Mr. Administrator at somewhere called a restaurant. They were so tasty!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't have a home? Didn't you just say a moment ago that you live with your mother?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't have a home? Didn't you just say a moment ago that you live with your mother?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't have a home? Didn't you just say a moment ago that you live with your mother?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother is gone 6 years ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother is gone 6 years ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother is gone 6 years ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now I lost my home too and have no place to go. So, Mr. Administrator's colleague brought me here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now I lost my home too and have no place to go. So, Mr. Administrator's colleague brought me here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now I lost my home too and have no place to go. So, Mr. Administrator's colleague brought me here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were searched for and brought here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were searched for and brought here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were searched for and brought here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you happen to know why? Maybe Boss knew your mother from before or something...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you happen to know why? Maybe Boss knew your mother from before or something...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you happen to know why? Maybe Boss knew your mother from before or something...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right! Mr. Administrator and Mother were colleagues!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right! Mr. Administrator and Mother were colleagues!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right! Mr. Administrator and Mother were colleagues!

records.m_Talk_ENG: When Mother was pregnant with me, Mr. Administrator left her and they never met again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When Mother was pregnant with me, Mr. Administrator left her and they never met again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When Mother was pregnant with me, Mr. Administrator left her and they never met again.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What...? Boss left your mother
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
What...? Boss left your mother
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
What...? Boss left your mother
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was Mother's decision. Mr. Administrator has a lot of things to do, so she didn't want to be a bother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was Mother's decision. Mr. Administrator has a lot of things to do, so she didn't want to be a bother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was Mother's decision. Mr. Administrator has a lot of things to do, so she didn't want to be a bother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There were times when I hated Mr. Administrator for leaving Mother and me behind, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: There were times when I hated Mr. Administrator for leaving Mother and me behind, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: There were times when I hated Mr. Administrator for leaving Mother and me behind, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now I understand. Protecting the world is an incredibly busy task.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now I understand. Protecting the world is an incredibly busy task.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now I understand. Protecting the world is an incredibly busy task.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now I'm all grown up and want to be of some help to Mr. Administrator. That's why I came here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now I'm all grown up and want to be of some help to Mr. Administrator. That's why I came here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now I'm all grown up and want to be of some help to Mr. Administrator. That's why I came here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard you're being discharged today. How are you feeling?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard you're being discharged today. How are you feeling?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard you're being discharged today. How are you feeling?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sure. I got to rest comfortably because others were busy instead.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sure. I got to rest comfortably because others were busy instead.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sure. I got to rest comfortably because others were busy instead.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since other squad members needed more time to recover, I decided to return to work first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since other squad members needed more time to recover, I decided to return to work first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since other squad members needed more time to recover, I decided to return to work first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If necessary, feel free to use your year-end vacation. Even the Vice President won't object to that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If necessary, feel free to use your year-end vacation. Even the Vice President won't object to that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If necessary, feel free to use your year-end vacation. Even the Vice President won't object to that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, thank you for caring.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, thank you for caring.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, thank you for caring.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But isn't it a bit of a waste to spend my precious <color=#ffd34c>youth</color> in a hospital? I want to build my career, even just a little more.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But isn't it a bit of a waste to spend my precious <color=#ffd34c>youth</color> in a hospital? I want to build my career, even just a little more.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But isn't it a bit of a waste to spend my precious <color=#ffd34c>youth</color> in a hospital? I want to build my career, even just a little more.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
You say career
8v
root.m_Talk_DEU:
You say career
8v
root.m_Talk_FRA:
You say career
8v

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't think there will be any tasks that could boost your career for now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't think there will be any tasks that could boost your career for now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't think there will be any tasks that could boost your career for now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Instead, I'd like to assign you the task of training a rookie Counter if you're okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Instead, I'd like to assign you the task of training a rookie Counter if you're okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Instead, I'd like to assign you the task of training a rookie Counter if you're okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Training a rookie? Me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Training a rookie? Me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Training a rookie? Me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's not officially an employee yet, but I'm counting on you to help her become competent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's not officially an employee yet, but I'm counting on you to help her become competent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's not officially an employee yet, but I'm counting on you to help her become competent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Especially in terms of social skills.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Especially in terms of social skills.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Especially in terms of social skills.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a personal favor of mine. If teaching feels too burdensome, let me know in advance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a personal favor of mine. If teaching feels too burdensome, let me know in advance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a personal favor of mine. If teaching feels too burdensome, let me know in advance.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Haha, so it is a personal favor from Boss
8v?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Haha, so it is a personal favor from Boss
8v?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Haha, so it is a personal favor from Boss
8v?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This works out well. As I'm reporting back after a long time, it's good not to be awkward alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This works out well. As I'm reporting back after a long time, it's good not to be awkward alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This works out well. As I'm reporting back after a long time, it's good not to be awkward alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. I'll leave it all in your hands, Seo Yoon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. I'll leave it all in your hands, Seo Yoon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. I'll leave it all in your hands, Seo Yoon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leave it to me. Just like always.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leave it to me. Just like always.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leave it to me. Just like always.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That was a pointless thing to say. <color=#ffd34c>Youth</color>, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That was a pointless thing to say. <color=#ffd34c>Youth</color>, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That was a pointless thing to say. <color=#ffd34c>Youth</color>, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've never even experienced a time like that, so why did I say something like that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've never even experienced a time like that, so why did I say something like that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've never even experienced a time like that, so why did I say something like that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Instructor for a rookie...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Instructor for a rookie...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Instructor for a rookie...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I won't be bored, at least.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I won't be bored, at least.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I won't be bored, at least.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She still hasn't arrived yet?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She still hasn't arrived yet?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She still hasn't arrived yet?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No... She said she'd come by city bus, but I've been waiting at the stop for an hour and haven't seen her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No... She said she'd come by city bus, but I've been waiting at the stop for an hour and haven't seen her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No... She said she'd come by city bus, but I've been waiting at the stop for an hour and haven't seen her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She doesn't have a contact number. Should we consider filing a missing person report?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She doesn't have a contact number. Should we consider filing a missing person report?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She doesn't have a contact number. Should we consider filing a missing person report?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You mentioned there's just one bus route from the airport to the company, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You mentioned there's just one bus route from the airport to the company, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You mentioned there's just one bus route from the airport to the company, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? But I want to keep watching the view from the window here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? But I want to keep watching the view from the window here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? But I want to keep watching the view from the window here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, kid. Like I said earlier, all passengers have to get off at the turnaround point.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, kid. Like I said earlier, all passengers have to get off at the turnaround point.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, kid. Like I said earlier, all passengers have to get off at the turnaround point.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, but buses don't run for free. Or you can pay more money.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, but buses don't run for free. Or you can pay more money.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, but buses don't run for free. Or you can pay more money.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't have any money left...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't have any money left...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't have any money left...

root.m_Talk_ENG: How about this? It smells really good.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How about this? It smells really good.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How about this? It smells really good.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A bouquet...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A bouquet...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A bouquet...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you trying to sell me flowers?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you trying to sell me flowers?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you trying to sell me flowers?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... well...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... well...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... well...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't need change!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't need change!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't need change!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Change, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Change, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Change, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
We're about to leave, so if you're just messing around, step off
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
We're about to leave, so if you're just messing around, step off
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
We're about to leave, so if you're just messing around, step off
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Phew, good thing it hasn't left yet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Phew, good thing it hasn't left yet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Phew, good thing it hasn't left yet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Two tickets, please.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Two tickets, please.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Two tickets, please.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Two? But it looks like you're alone, miss.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Two? But it looks like you're alone, miss.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Two? But it looks like you're alone, miss.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's for my little sister here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's for my little sister here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's for my little sister here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's your sibling?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's your sibling?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's your sibling?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um... Thank you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um... Thank you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um... Thank you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No need to thank me. You'll pay it back eventually.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No need to thank me. You'll pay it back eventually.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No need to thank me. You'll pay it back eventually.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're the rookie coming to train at Coffin Company, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're the rookie coming to train at Coffin Company, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're the rookie coming to train at Coffin Company, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, no.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, no.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, no.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My name isn't rookie, it's Solovey.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My name isn't rookie, it's Solovey.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My name isn't rookie, it's Solovey.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, you've got a strong sense of self, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, you've got a strong sense of self, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, you've got a strong sense of self, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But no fare money? Did Boss not give you enough?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But no fare money? Did Boss not give you enough?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But no fare money? Did Boss not give you enough?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I gave the money to someone else.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, I gave the money to someone else.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, I gave the money to someone else.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone else? Who?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone else? Who?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone else? Who?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I ran into a child before getting on the bus.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I ran into a child before getting on the bus.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I ran into a child before getting on the bus.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. So you gave away all the money you had?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. So you gave away all the money you had?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. So you gave away all the money you had?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She said she needed to buy so expensive medicine to cure her mother's sickness.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She said she needed to buy so expensive medicine to cure her mother's sickness.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She said she needed to buy so expensive medicine to cure her mother's sickness.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When someone precious to you is sick, it's sad. That's why I gave it to her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When someone precious to you is sick, it's sad. That's why I gave it to her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When someone precious to you is sick, it's sad. That's why I gave it to her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Expensive medicine...? That's such an obvious lie.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Expensive medicine...? That's such an obvious lie.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Expensive medicine...? That's such an obvious lie.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you really that gullible?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you really that gullible?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you really that gullible?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was a lie? But she really seemed to need it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was a lie? But she really seemed to need it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was a lie? But she really seemed to need it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh*

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was told to teach you social skills, but I wasn't sure where to start. But never expected you would fall for such a simple trick.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was told to teach you social skills, but I wasn't sure where to start. But never expected you would fall for such a simple trick.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was told to teach you social skills, but I wasn't sure where to start. But never expected you would fall for such a simple trick.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Listen carefully. You shouldn't easily trust people just based on their appearance or words.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Listen carefully. You shouldn't easily trust people just based on their appearance or words.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Listen carefully. You shouldn't easily trust people just based on their appearance or words.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Especially in the city, trusting anyone too easily will only lead to losses.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Especially in the city, trusting anyone too easily will only lead to losses.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Especially in the city, trusting anyone too easily will only lead to losses.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Got it! I won't give money away so easily anymore!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Got it! I won't give money away so easily anymore!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Got it! I won't give money away so easily anymore!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even though I don't have any right now...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even though I don't have any right now...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even though I don't have any right now...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine. You came here to earn money, so work hard to save money from now on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine. You came here to earn money, so work hard to save money from now on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine. You came here to earn money, so work hard to save money from now on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I was planning to start by assessing your Counter ability, but it looks like there's a long way to go in other aspects too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I was planning to start by assessing your Counter ability, but it looks like there's a long way to go in other aspects too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I was planning to start by assessing your Counter ability, but it looks like there's a long way to go in other aspects too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, how did you end up staying on the bus until the last stop? Did you doze off?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, how did you end up staying on the bus until the last stop? Did you doze off?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, how did you end up staying on the bus until the last stop? Did you doze off?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No? It's my first time riding something this fun.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No? It's my first time riding something this fun.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No? It's my first time riding something this fun.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The view outside the window was moving so captivatingly that I lost track of time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The view outside the window was moving so captivatingly that I lost track of time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The view outside the window was moving so captivatingly that I lost track of time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't know I'd have to pay more to keep riding, though.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't know I'd have to pay more to keep riding, though.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't know I'd have to pay more to keep riding, though.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's always good to have money on you. In the city, you can enjoy all sorts of benefits, but most of them require money.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's always good to have money on you. In the city, you can enjoy all sorts of benefits, but most of them require money.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's always good to have money on you. In the city, you can enjoy all sorts of benefits, but most of them require money.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where have you been living until now that you don't even know how to ride a bus?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where have you been living until now that you don't even know how to ride a bus?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where have you been living until now that you don't even know how to ride a bus?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I lived in a garden. With Mother when it was the two of us, and even when I was alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I lived in a garden. With Mother when it was the two of us, and even when I was alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I lived in a garden. With Mother when it was the two of us, and even when I was alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There aren't many flowers or trees here, but I like it because there are so many big houses.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There aren't many flowers or trees here, but I like it because there are so many big houses.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There aren't many flowers or trees here, but I like it because there are so many big houses.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A garden...? So apparently she's a countryside kid who has just moved to the city?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A garden...? So apparently she's a countryside kid who has just moved to the city?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A garden...? So apparently she's a countryside kid who has just moved to the city?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's going to take a lot of work, but I don't have a choice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's going to take a lot of work, but I don't have a choice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's going to take a lot of work, but I don't have a choice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Seo Yoon. I'll be looking after you starting today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Seo Yoon. I'll be looking after you starting today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Seo Yoon. I'll be looking after you starting today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a veteran of Coffin Company, where you'll be training, and one of the Boss's closest associates.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a veteran of Coffin Company, where you'll be training, and one of the Boss's closest associates.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a veteran of Coffin Company, where you'll be training, and one of the Boss's closest associates.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: For now, stick with me and don't wander off on your own. If I leave you alone, no matter how much money you're given, you'll end up broke in no time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For now, stick with me and don't wander off on your own. If I leave you alone, no matter how much money you're given, you'll end up broke in no time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For now, stick with me and don't wander off on your own. If I leave you alone, no matter how much money you're given, you'll end up broke in no time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! I'll make sure to stay right by you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! I'll make sure to stay right by you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! I'll make sure to stay right by you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: By the way, how did you end up joining this company? Boss doesn't bring in just anyone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: By the way, how did you end up joining this company? Boss doesn't bring in just anyone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: By the way, how did you end up joining this company? Boss doesn't bring in just anyone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't have a home. I heard the company provides training and a place to stay, so I came here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't have a home. I heard the company provides training and a place to stay, so I came here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't have a home. I heard the company provides training and a place to stay, so I came here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Before I got here, I ate pork cutlets with Mr. Administrator at somewhere called a restaurant. They were so tasty!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Before I got here, I ate pork cutlets with Mr. Administrator at somewhere called a restaurant. They were so tasty!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Before I got here, I ate pork cutlets with Mr. Administrator at somewhere called a restaurant. They were so tasty!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You don't have a home? Didn't you just say a moment ago that you live with your mother?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You don't have a home? Didn't you just say a moment ago that you live with your mother?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You don't have a home? Didn't you just say a moment ago that you live with your mother?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mother is gone 6 years ago.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mother is gone 6 years ago.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mother is gone 6 years ago.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now I lost my home too and have no place to go. So, Mr. Administrator's colleague brought me here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now I lost my home too and have no place to go. So, Mr. Administrator's colleague brought me here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now I lost my home too and have no place to go. So, Mr. Administrator's colleague brought me here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were searched for and brought here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were searched for and brought here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were searched for and brought here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you happen to know why? Maybe Boss knew your mother from before or something...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you happen to know why? Maybe Boss knew your mother from before or something...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you happen to know why? Maybe Boss knew your mother from before or something...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right! Mr. Administrator and Mother were colleagues!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right! Mr. Administrator and Mother were colleagues!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right! Mr. Administrator and Mother were colleagues!

root.m_Talk_ENG: When Mother was pregnant with me, Mr. Administrator left her and they never met again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When Mother was pregnant with me, Mr. Administrator left her and they never met again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When Mother was pregnant with me, Mr. Administrator left her and they never met again.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
What...? Boss left your mother
8v?
root.m_Talk_DEU:
What...? Boss left your mother
8v?
root.m_Talk_FRA:
What...? Boss left your mother
8v?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was Mother's decision. Mr. Administrator has a lot of things to do, so she didn't want to be a bother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was Mother's decision. Mr. Administrator has a lot of things to do, so she didn't want to be a bother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was Mother's decision. Mr. Administrator has a lot of things to do, so she didn't want to be a bother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There were times when I hated Mr. Administrator for leaving Mother and me behind, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: There were times when I hated Mr. Administrator for leaving Mother and me behind, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: There were times when I hated Mr. Administrator for leaving Mother and me behind, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now I understand. Protecting the world is an incredibly busy task.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now I understand. Protecting the world is an incredibly busy task.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now I understand. Protecting the world is an incredibly busy task.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now I'm all grown up and want to be of some help to Mr. Administrator. That's why I came here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now I'm all grown up and want to be of some help to Mr. Administrator. That's why I came here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now I'm all grown up and want to be of some help to Mr. Administrator. That's why I came here.
